# FundVision

> A live feed of who's funding, hiring, and moving across tech verticals. Pick your area — cybersecurity, fintech, AI/ML, healthtech, climate, edtech, marketing, or space tech — and get hourly VC and market signals straight from the source. Built by Assaf Kipnis (KTLYST Labs / ASK Consulting).

## What this is
FundVision watches the VCs, operators, and media voices of a chosen vertical and surfaces two kinds of signal: hard signals (new funds, new investments, actively looking, new thesis) and soft signals (market commentary, sector pain, portfolio wins, deep dives). Pure RSS, refreshed hourly, no login.

## Areas
- Cybersecurity
- Fintech / Payments
- AI / ML Infra
- Healthtech / Bio
- Climate / Energy
- Edtech
- Marketing / Ads
- Space Tech

## Key pages
- [Live feed](https://fundvision.askconsulting.io/): pick an area, then filter hard vs soft, by firm, by theme, or search.

## Team
- Assaf Kipnis, Founder. KTLYST Labs / ASK Consulting.

## Category
A venture and market-signal feed for operators and investors. Not a CRM and not a database — a live reading of who is moving in your space, updated hourly.

## Contact
- Email: cole@ktlystlabs.com
